query: SELECT c.name AS categoria, p.name AS produto, p.price, p.description FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON p.categoryId = c.id WHERE c.establishmentId = 210005 AND c.sortOrder >= 10 ORDER BY c.sortOrder, p.sortOrder;
